title: CONSTRUCTION AND CONTRACTING
summary: Turnkey support for public and private construction projects, infrastructure, superstructure, restoration, landscaping and technical consultancy.

title: HARDWARE AND INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT
summary: Supply, marketing, import and export of hardware, connection elements, cutting tools, measuring equipment and heavy industrial machinery.

title: ELECTRICAL AND ELECTRONICS
summary: Procurement, trade and integration of electrical systems, technological equipment, automation and technical infrastructure.

title: TRANSPORTATION AND LOGISTICS
summary: Professional coordination of shipping organizations for products, equipment and commercial goods with a focus on timely delivery.

title: INDUSTRIAL RAW MATERIALS
summary: Reliable sourcing of industrial raw materials and semi-finished products from domestic and international markets.

title: MACHINES AND EQUIPMENT
summary: Wholesale supply of machinery, equipment and related parts needed by industrial and construction projects.

title: CONVEYOR BELTS
summary: Reliable conveyor belt solutions and components for industrial systems and equipment continuity.

title: BEARINGS
summary: Durable bearings and mechanical components for machinery, production lines and industrial maintenance.

title: TECHNICAL CERAMICS
summary: Glass and ceramic products for technical use, selected for quality, durability and sector-specific requirements.

title: ABRASIVES AND SANDPAPER
summary: Sanding, abrasion and finishing products for industrial, construction and equipment-related applications.
